name: Improving Wind and Solar Power Prediction with Efficient Wrapper-based Feature Selection: An Empirical Study

description: arXiv:2607.14024v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: With rising global energy demand and growing awareness of climate change and its impacts, the share of renewable energies in the global energy mix continues to grow. Unlike conventional power generation, the output of renewable energy sources cannot be controlled as consistently due to their dependence on environmental conditions. Therefore, rel...
author: Daniel Grillmeyer, Marius Hadry, Michael Stenger, Vanessa Borst, Veronika Lesch, Samuel Kounev
